title: Show ALL tasks on the Mapping Widget

posts.author: tayamaree (Taya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys

We are using the Map Widget to identify the location of our clients but it is only showing some of the task locations. When we zoom out it shows the total number, but when zoomed in only a few actually show??

Can you please look at making this work more efficiently so it’s actually a useful widget. It would be amazing if it showed all clients and their location.

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Taya,

Is it possible to share a screenshot or short screen-recording of the behaviour you’re experiencing? I am not sure I am understanding the issue here and want to be sure I do, incase this might be a bug

posts.author: tayamaree (Taya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca

Please see loom video link below.

https://www.loom.com/share/97fb09b6877c4b10ab9e4fd2f30d59e0

The example is that in the Coolangatta area it shows the number 8. But when you zoom in there are only 5.

Thanks
